name: datamol
description: Pythonic wrapper around RDKit with simplified interface and sensible defaults. Preferred for standard drug discovery including SMILES parsing, standardization, descriptors, fingerprints, clustering, 3D conformers, parall

interface.shortDescription: Pythonic wrapper around RDKit with simplified interface and sensible defaults. Preferred for standard drug discovery inc
